SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.allocation

Class LinearAllocationSolver

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.allocation.LinearAllocationSolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class LinearAllocationSolver extends Object implements Serializable
Solves the linear production-allocation network per component by superposition.

For every component k the steady-state node inlet flows V_k (one column per source) satisfy (I - A_k) V_k = B_k, where A_k is the routing matrix from AllocationNetwork and B_k injects each source's component flow at its entry node. A single LU factorization of (I - A_k) solves all source right-hand sides at once.

If the direct solve fails or returns a non-finite result, the solver falls back to a fixed-point (Neumann series) iteration V &#8592; B + A_k V, which converges because the network loop gain is below one. Small negative node flows arising from numerical round-off are clipped to zero.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • solve

      public LinearAllocationSolver.SolverResult solve(AllocationNetwork network, int[] sourceEntryUnits, double[][] sourceInjections)
      Solves the allocation network for all components and sources.
      Parameters:
      network - the assembled proxy network; must be non-null
      sourceEntryUnits - node index each source enters, length S; must be non-null
      sourceInjections - per-source per-component molar injection [S][numComponents] in mole/sec; must be non-null
      Returns:
      a LinearAllocationSolver.SolverResult with node flows and diagnostics

    • toSimple

      private static org.ejml.simple.SimpleMatrix toSimple(double[][] a)
      Converts a primitive matrix to an EJML SimpleMatrix.
      Parameters:
      a - the matrix; must be non-null and rectangular
      Returns:
      the equivalent SimpleMatrix

    • isFinite

      private static boolean isFinite(org.ejml.simple.SimpleMatrix m)
      Checks whether all entries of a matrix are finite.
      Parameters:
      m - the matrix; must be non-null
      Returns:
      true if every entry is finite

    • setMaxIterations

      public void setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of fixed-point iterations for the fallback solver.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - the iteration cap; must be positive

    • setTolerance

      public void setTolerance(double tolerance)
      Sets the relative residual tolerance for the fallback solver.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - the tolerance; must be positive

    • setNegativeClipTolerance

      public void setNegativeClipTolerance(double negativeClipTolerance)
      Sets the magnitude below which negative node flows are clipped to zero.
      Parameters:
      negativeClipTolerance - the clip tolerance; must be non-negative
